summary: Surah Adh-Dhariyat emphasizes Allah’s power and signs in creation, the reality of resurrection, and the purpose of life: worshipping Allah. It recounts the stories of past prophets and nations, highlighting their denial and destruction. The surah describes the fate of the righteous and the wicked, urges hastening towards Allah, and reminds that sustenance comes only from Him.
